home.title: Three disciplines. One team that builds, tunes, and ships.
home.subtitle: Choose your area and jump directly to services, projects, and a clear next step.

construction.title: Construction
construction.subtitle: Renovation and finishing work delivered with precision, planning, and premium execution.

projects.title: Full interior renovations
projects.text: Managed from preparation and demolition to final finishes.

projects.title: Custom bathrooms
projects.text: Layout, installation, and tiling with durable material choices.

projects.title: Stair systems
projects.text: Build and restoration work with high structural and visual standards.

construction.contact: Send us your plans and we will prepare a custom project proposal.

mechanics.title: Tuning & Mechanics
mechanics.subtitle: Diagnostics, upgrades, and repairs for vehicles and machines with fast turnaround.

projects.title: Fleet optimization
projects.text: Performance tuning for higher efficiency and lower downtime.

projects.title: Vehicle upgrades
projects.text: Mechanical and software adjustments for better response.

projects.title: On-site service
projects.text: Rapid diagnostics and repair directly at your location.

mechanics.contact: Contact us for regular maintenance, emergency repair, or custom tuning work.

it.title: Computer Science
it.subtitle: We deliver modern software products that improve real business operations.

projects.title: Web platforms
projects.text: Fast, secure products with clear user journeys.

projects.title: Operational dashboards
projects.text: Live metrics for sales, service, and production workflows.

projects.title: Automation systems
projects.text: Integrated tools that remove repetitive manual tasks.

it.contact: Reach out to discuss a custom software solution for your team.
